blended.narrative: Wildcat Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 4.2 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 590 ft. Looking ahead, 19 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 4" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 46°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 12" of heavy snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
